channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Disney just agreed to pay out $50 million to some YouTube TV and DirecTV Stream subscribers — here’s how to make a claim for your share and find out if you’re owed it
item.description: YouTube TV and DirecTV Stream subscribers, listen up — you could be owed a share of $50 million thanks to a Disney lawsuit settlement.

item.title: Meta’s glasses will turn off the camera if you tamper with the privacy light
item.description: Amid public backlash over its smart glasses, Meta announced that it will be updating its glasses with a new feature that will disable the camera when it detects that someone has tampered with or destroyed the glasses' privacy LED light. The update is meant to address modders who have taken actions such as physically drilling […]

item.title: The Logitech Lift is the best ergonomic mouse I’ve tried — and this Prime Day deal drops it to a record-low price of just AU$58.34 / NZ$74.39
item.description: Get a whisper-quiet ergonomic mouse that’s so comfortable, your wrist will love you for it — and it doesn't cost the earth either.

item.title: Chinese firm that created TikTok now wants to build an AI accelerator to rival Nvidia within months
item.description: ByteDance is developing its own AI chip to reduce Nvidia dependence, targeting mass production by late 2027.

item.title: Meta built an AI detection tool to ID images and video created with its new models
item.description: Meta's new AI detector has rate limits for some reason.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, July 8 (game #1123)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, July 8 (game #857)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, July 8 (game #1626)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: Samsung just set the date for its next Galaxy Unpacked — and 'A New Shape Unfolds' could be its biggest clue yet about what to expect
item.description: Samsung has officially set July 22, 2026, as the date for its next Galaxy Unpacked event, teasing a new next-generation foldable phone with the tagline "A New Shape Unfolds."

item.title: The next Samsung Galaxy Unpacked launch is happening on July 22
item.description: The next Samsung Galaxy Unpacked launch is happening on July 22.

item.title: New solar panel design could increase could increase daily PV energy production by 20% and it is far more important than you think
item.description: Canadian startup Reflect10 develops light-reflecting solar panel geometry to boost energy production in suboptimal conditions.

item.title: Final extension: Startup Battlefield Australia applications now close July 20
item.description: If you're building something ambitious, this is a fast track to the people who can move your startup forward.

item.title: Should I buy a Kindle Colorsoft or a Paperwhite? Here's what you need to know to make your decision
item.description: This cheatsheet runs through the key similarities, differences and use cases for each ereader range.

item.title: Insta360 X6 camera set to launch, FCC filing suggests
item.description: Insta360's next 360 degree camera seems poised for a launch following new FCC filings.

item.title: Meta rolls out Muse, a new AI image generator
item.description: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.
